title: Advice/Crit on AI Trading Prompt - Trend Continuation
author: claytantor
selftext:
Hey I am using an perpetuals crypto AI trading platform called [katbot.xyz](http://katbot.xyz) and I am looking for some advice on a prompt I am designing for the recommendation AI. Would love advice/crit... This is a trend continuation strategy I made, any room for improvement?

Find trend continuation opportunities using market\_data\_tool where established trends are pulling back to value:

`Entry criteria:`

`1. trend_direction = BULLISH with trend_strength > 60`

`2. Short-term pullback: price_change_1h_pct or price_change_4h_pct negative`

`3. Longer-term intact: price_change_24h_pct or price_change_7d_pct positive`

`4. RSI pullback: rsi_14 between 40-55 (pulled back from momentum but not oversold)`

`5. Price near nearest_support`

`Use recent_candles to identify the pullback structure and provide entry, stop-loss (below nearest_support), and target levels.`
